task:
Load the local HTML file file:///home/user/Documents/report.html (page title 'Quarterly Report Q4 2025') in Firefox and add a bookmark for it. Then open a second tab and navigate to https://example.com.

When finished, two tabs must be open: one on file:///home/user/Documents/report.html and one on https://example.com.

verification.description: Tab with local report.html file is open
Bookmark for the Quarterly Report page exists
Page contains the title text 'Quarterly Report Q4 2025'
